description: Flyover scene geometry -- large ground plane below (rotation [-PI/2,0,0]), sky plane above, optional landmark planes rising from the ground. Camera moves forward and slightly downward-looking. Aerial/bird's-eye perspective feel. Defines slot positions, rotations, sizes, required/optional flags, compatible cameras, default camera, and fog settings per Section 4.2.
notes: Tier 2 geometry. 6 slots (sky, ground, landmark_far, landmark_left, landmark_right, near_fg). 2 required (sky, ground). Default camera: slow_push_forward (verified). flyover_glide listed as forward reference. Light atmospheric fog #b8c6d4. Landscape preferred.
